originalTitle: Djibouti's president wins unprecedented sixth term with 97.8% of vote
title: Djibouti's president wins unprecedented sixth term with 97.8% of vote
content: Ismail Omar Guelleh, 78, has extended his already 27-year rule in a poll boycotted by the main opposition candidates.

originalTitle: Nearly 400 sentenced in Nigeria for links to militant Islamists
title: Nearly 400 sentenced in Nigeria for links to militant Islamists
content: Judges handed down sentences ranging from five years to life imprisonment following mass trials.

originalTitle: UK shelves Chagos deal after Trump opposition
title: UK shelves Chagos deal after Trump opposition
content: UK government officials say they are not entirely abandoning the agreement but have run out of time.

originalTitle: Hungry Fury ‘light and lean’ for heavyweight comeback fight with Makhmudov
title: Hungry Fury ‘light and lean’ for heavyweight comeback fight with Makhmudov
content: Tyson Fury returns lighter than his last ‌fight but still weighs in three pounds heavier than Arslanbek Makhmudov.

originalTitle: Christians return to Jerusalem’s Holy Sepulchre as Israel eases restriction
title: Christians return to Jerusalem’s Holy Sepulchre as Israel eases restriction
content: Orthodox Christians celebrated Easter’s Holy Fire ceremony at Jerusalem’s Holy Sepulchre.

originalTitle: Police begin arrests at UK protest against Palestine Action ban
title: Police begin arrests at UK protest against Palestine Action ban
content: Hundreds of people gather in Trafalgar Square for demonstration, as elderly woman with cane is escorted away by police.

originalTitle: Artemis crew home safely after completing historic mission to the Moon
title: Artemis crew home safely after completing historic mission to the Moon
content: Four astronauts splashed down in the Pacific after a nine-day voyage that took them further from Earth than any humans.

originalTitle: Final push for votes as challenger to Hungary's Orbán senses victory
title: Final push for votes as challenger to Hungary's Orbán senses victory
content: As Péter Magyar's opposition movement leads in the polls, tens of thousands of anti-Orbán supporters fill Heroes' Square in Budapest.

originalTitle: Frontrunner for California governor denies sexual assault allegations
title: Frontrunner for California governor denies sexual assault allegations
content: The Democratic congressman, a leading candidate in the race, has strongly denied the accusations saying he will fight with "facts".

originalTitle: A tough season, playing angry, and messaging Michael Owen
title: A tough season, playing angry, and messaging Michael Owen
content: Ollie Watkins speaks to Kelly Somers about Aston Villa, England and his World Cup dream.

originalTitle: West Ham have fresh hope - but Spurs now in uncharted territory
title: West Ham have fresh hope - but Spurs now in uncharted territory
content: West Ham's thumping win over Wolves not only boosts their own Premier League survival hopes, but plunges Tottenham into the drop zone - and to new depths.

originalTitle: Wilshere seeks first trophy against Wembley regular Challinor
title: Wilshere seeks first trophy against Wembley regular Challinor
content: Luton Town boss Jack Wilshere faces Stockport County boss and Wembley regular Dave Challinor in Sunday's EFL Trophy final.
